rules: Headings (Size > 32px) MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines / Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Variable fonts: use unconventional weights if available.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_layout: Sidebar on left (w-64), Main content area with dense, compact spacing (gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous Spacing Philosophy (p-6, p-8 for containers). Containers with borders MUST have padding on text.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, labels, and metrics. Optical alignment for icons.

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), NO soft shadow. Use sharp edges or subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius).
components.buttons: Primary buttons use #F7931A with black text for contrast. Hover: Lighter hue.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard inputs, customized with 1px border. Focus: ring-2 ring-primary/50.
components.charts: Shadcn Chart components (Recharts). Area chart preferred for Bitcoin growth, using a golden gradient fill under the line.
components.sidebar: Fixed, border-r border-border/40. Darker than main background.
components.login_screen: Split screen layout. Left: Login form with minimalist inputs. Right: Hero image overlay (max overlay bg-black/50 or bg-black/30) with Bitcoin luxury image.

motion_and_interactions.hover: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Slight lift (-translate-y-1) for dashboard cards.
motion_and_interactions.focus: Focus States must have HIGHER contrast than default state.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease).

login_hero_image.description: Bitcoin coin isolated on a black background. Use for the right side of the login split screen.

dashboard_texture.description: Dark luxury slate texture. Use as a very low opacity (5%) background blend or noise layer in dark mode.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Satoshi for body.
Implement a Dark/Light toggle. Default to Dark mode.
DO NOT use Teal (#1B93A4) anywhere, as it is strictly forbidden by the Anti-AI design system. Instead, rely on the premium Gold (#F7931A) and Slate/Midnight palette.
Use Shadcn UI components for Tabs, Sliders, Cards, and Inputs, customized for 'Cardless, rectangular' look.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a premium, dense dashboard look.
For the Chart, use Shadcn Charts (Recharts under the hood) showing an Area Chart with base vs user growth over time.
The login screen MUST use the provided 'login_hero_image' url on one side, with max 50% black overlay.
